title: uva-ursi tomentosa
intro: Uva-ursi tomentosa, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the boreal forests of Europe, Asia, and North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating urinary tract infections and other genitourinary issues. The health benefits of uva-ursi tomentosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight bacterial and fungal infections, and support the immune system. Uva-ursi tomentosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
